abilities.description: When you make a move to breach, traverse, or hide within an area held by an enemy, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} within an enemy area to discover their positions, plans, or methods, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} within that area through observation, you may roll +shadow (instead of wits). If you do, take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} within an enemy area by scavenging or looting, you may roll +shadow (instead of +wits). If you do, take +1 momentum or +1 supply on a hit.
